generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember the 2024 Midwest blackouts? Local officials were caught flat-footed because federal civil defense prep programs had been gutted. Now, with tensions rising in the Taiwan Strait, we can't afford to be unprepared again. Our neighbors in Ohio are organizing local emergency response networks - why isn't our state doing the same? #CommunityPreparedness #NeverAgain
